name: tokun
description: 🥷 tokun is a simple, and easy-to-use tool for working with design tokens with powerups.

scripts.build: rm -rf ./dist && bun run build:js && bun run build:types
scripts.build:js: bun build ./src/builder/browser/index.ts ./src/builder/index.ts --outdir ./dist --format esm --target node --splitting && bun build ./src/validators/index.ts --outfile ./dist/validators/index.js --format esm --target browser -e zod -e zod/* && bun build ./src/cli/index.ts --outfile ./dist/cli/index.js --format esm --target node -e tinyglobby -e zod -e zod/*

author: Bartosz Rajchert
